name: call-of-dragons-alliance-platform
description: Production-ready Alliance Management Platform for Call of Dragons alliances.

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @cod-amp/shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @cod-amp/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @cod-amp/discord-bot" "npm run dev --workspace @cod-amp/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cod-amp/shared && npm run build --workspace @cod-amp/backend && npm run build --workspace @cod-amp/discord-bot && npm run build --workspace @cod-amp/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @cod-amp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @cod-amp/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @cod-amp/discord-bot && npm run typecheck --workspace @cod-amp/frontend
